name: 截短霰弹枪 | 路霸
descriptionEn: The classic Sawed-Off deals very heavy close-range damage, but with its low accuracy, high spread and slow rate of fire, you'd better kill what you hit. It has been lacquered in black and gold using a scotch thistle motif. You don't have to hold your pinky out when pulling the trigger, but it's a nice touch
descriptionZh: 经典的截短霰弹枪拥有强大的近距离杀伤力，但同时也有着低精准，高散布和低射速的特点，你最好能迅速解决掉你击中的“地方”。 这把武器使用苏格兰蓟花的图案以黑色和金色进行了涂漆。 你不必用小指扣动扳机，不过握住时的感觉的确不错
